test.name: Test Own App Login Headless

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "firefox", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Metropolia\\front-end\\hyte-projekti\\outputs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\e707bbc9-c3b9-47e2-a1f4-482fe9ad3f39"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Keyword 'Take Screenshot fail-screenshot-{index}' could not be run on failure: Error: Tried to take screenshot, but no page was open.
Error: page.goto: NS_ERROR_CONNECTION_REFUSED Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:5173/", waiting until "load"
kw.status: Error: page.goto: NS_ERROR_CONNECTION_REFUSED Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:5173/", waiting until "load"

kw.name: Type Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click With Options
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.status: Error: page.goto: NS_ERROR_CONNECTION_REFUSED Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:5173/", waiting until "load"
